title: Home Screen WidgetKit Widget
description: Non-runnable feature container for the WidgetKit Home Screen widget epic. Coordinates all developer, tester, documentation, and review beads. Must be built in dependency order: shared sources → entitlements → KeychainHelper migration → widget target → extension code → views → deep linking → tests → docs → review.
acceptance_criteria: All child beads complete without errors
xcodebuild test exits 0 including all new widget-logic tests
Widget appears in the system gallery with working preview in small and medium sizes
Per-instance content source configuration works via long-press Edit Widget
Deep-link tap opens the correct article or thread from cold start
CF credentials read from shared Keychain Access Group; absent credentials show sign-in prompt
Hero images downsampled; image cache pruned to current 5 ids on each timeline build
